title: Drone attack on residential area
description: The Russian Federation has officially admitted that they will continue to fight garages, museums and high-rise buildings in Ukraine. Military criminals from the Russian Federation have informed the whole world that they will continue "systematic strikes" on civilian objects in Ukraine, since the paranoiacs in the Kremlin are sure that UAVs are being developed by Ukrainians in high-rise apartments, sold in shopping centers and markets, and assembled, apparently, in garages. What is worth...

Military criminals from the Russian Federation have informed the whole world that they will continue "systematic strikes" on civilian objects in Ukraine, since the paranoiacs in the Kremlin are sure that UAVs are being developed by Ukrainians in high-rise apartments, sold in shopping centers and markets, and assembled, apparently, in garages. title: Attack attack
description: He met with the mayor of the French city of Le Havre, head of the Horizons political party, Edouard Philippe. I am grateful for the support of our people, and this visit in particular is an important manifestation of solidarity with Ukraine, especially after the recent massive Russian attacks on our country. They talked about our movement towards membership in the European Union. We appreciate France's consistent support in this matter. We look forward to opening...
description_en: He met with the mayor of the French city of Le Havre, head of the Horizons political party, Edouard Philippe. I am grateful for the support of our people, and this visit in particular is an important manifestation of solidarity with Ukraine, especially after the recent massive Russian attacks on our country. They talked about our movement towards membership in the European Union. We appreciate France's consistent support in this matter. We look forward to opening...
description_uk: Зустрівся з мером французького міста Гавр, головою політичної партії «Горизонти» Едуаром Філіппом. Вдячний за підтримку нашого народу, і зокрема цей візит є важливим проявом солідарності з Україною, особливо після нещодавніх російських масованих атак по нашій країні. Говорили про наш рух до членства у Євросоюзі. Цінуємо послідовну підтримку Франції в цьому питанні. Ми розраховуємо на відкриття...

On the way to the maroon beret...

description: The enemy's command posts and logistics were hit, and the shutdown of the Syzransky Refinery was confirmed on May 25, and on the night of May 26, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine inflicted damage on a number of important objects of the aggressor. ⚡️In particular, the enemy's command post (Ocheretyne, Donetsk region) and the command post of the regiment (Verkhnia Krynytsia, Zaporizhia region) were hit. ⚡️Aircraft control points were also affected...
description_en: The enemy's command posts and logistics were hit, and the shutdown of the Syzransky Refinery was confirmed on May 25, and on the night of May 26, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine inflicted damage on a number of important objects of the aggressor. ⚡️In particular, the enemy's command post (Ocheretyne, Donetsk region) and the command post of the regiment (Verkhnia Krynytsia, Zaporizhia region) were hit. ⚡️Aircraft control points were also affected...
description_uk: Уражено командні пункти, логістику противника та підтверджено зупинку роботи НПЗ “Сызранский” 25 травня та в ніч на 26 травня 2026 року підрозділи Сил оборони України завдали уражень по низці важливих об’єктів агресора. ⚡️Зокрема, уражено командний пункт противника (Очеретине, Донецької обл.) та пункт управління полку (Верхня Криниця, Запорізької обл.). ⚡️Також уражено пункти управління БпЛА...

title: Poltava: Casualties reported
description: The controversial life and unsolved death of Symon Petliura, one of Ukraine's most famous leaders A century ago, on May 25, 1926, an otherwise ordinary afternoon in Paris’ bohemian Latin Quarter was disrupted by a barrage of gunshots, leaving one of Ukraine’s famous military leaders dead in the street. Born in Poltava in 1879 to a family of Cossack descent, Symon Petliura would rise to command...

title: Today is the Day of the State Service of Special Communications and...
title_en: Today is the Day of the State Service of Special Communications and...
description: Today is the Day of the State Service of Special Communications and Information Protection of Ukraine. I thank you for the contribution to the protection of the sovereignty of Ukraine, for the stable communication, starting from the first days of the full-scale Russian invasion. He congratulated the servicemen of the State Special Forces on their professional holiday and honored them with state awards, as well as presented the epaulettes of a major general to the head of the SSSZI Oleksandr Potiy....
description_en: Today is the Day of the State Service of Special Communications and Information Protection of Ukraine. I thank you for the contribution to the protection of the sovereignty of Ukraine, for the stable communication, starting from the first days of the full-scale Russian invasion. He congratulated the servicemen of the State Special Forces on their professional holiday and honored them with state awards, as well as presented the epaulettes of a major general to the head of the SSSZI Oleksandr Potiy....
description_uk: Сьогодні День Державної служби спеціального зв’язку та захисту інформації України. Я дякую за внесок у захист суверенітету України, за стабільний зв'язок, починаючи з перших днів повномасштабного російського вторгнення. Привітав військовослужбовців Держспецзв’язку з професійним святом і відзначив їх державними нагородами, а також вручив погони генерал-майора керівнику ДССЗЗІ Олександру Потію....

title: Mariupol: Attack attack on infrastructure

One of the important logistical ways of supplying troops and resources to the occupied part of Ukraine. 🟡But the development of the middle strike direction, which is becoming more and more relevant on the agenda, deserves even more attention. This issue has become critical already...

Це питання стало критичним вже...
